response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify two distinct song performances: '告白日和、です！' (00:00-02:30) and '世界は恋に落ちている' (02:34-04:59), with a transition in between. 2. Identified performers as Yuzuki Choco and Nakiri Ayame. 3. Used web search to find original artists and lyrics for both songs, following the strict guidelines. 4. Compiled lyrics and metadata into the final JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two VTubers, Yuzuki Choco and Nakiri Ayame, performing two songs: '告白日和、です！' (Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!) and '世界は恋に落ちている' (Sekai wa Koi ni Ochiteiru). The performance is part of Yuzuki Choco's 2026 birthday celebration.

scenes.description: The VTubers Yuzuki Choco and Nakiri Ayame perform the song '告白日和、です！'. The stage is brightly decorated with pink hearts and a countdown timer.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, can I ask you just one thing?
About me...
Maybe I'll see you today, my heart is pounding
I felt like skipping
A moment dancing in anticipation
I wonder if you're even thinking about me?
But... I'm right here, you know
I'm right here
My confidence is wavering, I wonder if you hate me?
Just go for it and say hello!
It finally cleared up, it cleared up completely
And I feel energetic too
Instead of just saying good morning, I'll tap your back
'Come on, let's go!'
Once it clears up, once it clears up completely
I'm sure you'll have a lively smile
Somehow, this current feeling has become bittersweet!
Even during class, I'm gazing far away
Isn't love sweet?
Maybe it's different, half painful
Rather than just dreaming, I have to touch and confirm it
So... let's get moving
Be like yourself, right?
Living happily, every day is a miracle
Instead of regretting not saying it, let's find the courage!
Since a long time ago, from a long time ago
I've been waiting, wanting to ask
I'll be the first to tell you
'I love you!'
It's been a long time, from a long time ago
Will you answer what I asked?
How are you feeling? Show me everything!
Living happily, every day is a miracle
Even if I'm scared, let's find the courage!
(Find the courage? Yeah!)
Since a long time ago, from a long time ago
I've been waiting, wanting to ask
I'll be the first to tell you
'I love you!'
It's been a long time, from a long time ago
Will you answer what I asked?
How are you feeling? Show me everything!

scenes.description: A brief musical interlude and stage transition between the two songs.
The VTubers perform '世界は恋に落ちている'. The stage lighting changes to match the mood of the song, featuring a large heart centerpiece.
scenes.song_title: 世界は恋に落ちている

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My world is falling in love
Arrows of light pierce my chest
I want to understand you
'Hey, tell me'
Just a little regret over words that passed by
Tears spilled over
Busy emotions link with my heartbeat
I want to confirm this tuning
Caught up only in my purpose
Important things fade and run away
Restart again today
My world is falling in love
Arrows of light pierce my chest
I want to understand everything
'Hey, let me hear it'
That one millimeter is too far
In the days I ran through
Unforgettable, unforgettable, a shining page
Somehow it's a complicated feeling seeing the two of you look so good together
My first emotion links with my heartbeat
I wonder if my thermometer broke?
Without understanding my own feelings
I even gave advice to that girl
My chest hurts...
My world is falling in love
Arrows of light pierce my chest
I noticed these feelings
'It's already too late'

But I still want to understand everything about you

I definitely want you to turn around
It was late, but I don't want to give up
Because I love you
